json_data.title: Preparation for the Major
json_data.description: Complete the following courses with grades of C– or better:

options.title: Musicianship
courses: MUSC M6A - Introduction to Global Musicianship
MUSC M6B - Introduction to Musicianship
MUSC M6C - Introduction to Musicianship

options.title: Music 20 Series
courses: MUSC 20A - Music Theory I
MUSC 20B - Music Theory II
MUSC 20C - Music Theory III

options.title: Music 21 Series
courses: MUSC 21A - Project Approach to Music Theory I
MUSC 21B - Project Approach to Music Theory II
MUSC 21C - Project Approach to Music Theory III

options.title: Instrumentalists
courses: Music 60A through 60U

options.title: Vocalists
courses: MUSC 61A - Voice Studio
MUSC 61C - Voice Coaching for Music Education Specialists

options.title: Large Conducted Ensembles
courses: MUSC C185A - UCLA Chorale
MUSC C185B - Chamber Singers
MUSC C185C - Opera Workshop
MUSC C185D - Symphony Orchestra
MUSC C185E - Philharmonia
MUSC 185F - Symphonic Band
MUSC C185G - Wind Ensemble
MUSC 185H - Marching and Varsity Bands

json_data.title: The Major
json_data.description: Complete the following courses with grades of C- or better:

options.title: Musicianship
courses: MUSC 102A - Advanced Musicianship I
MUSC 102B - Advanced Musicianship II
MUSC 102C - Advanced Musicianship III

options.title: Theory
courses: MUSC 111A - Music Theory through Improvisation
MUSC 111B - Music Creation and Analysis through Technology
MUSC 111C - Arranging Music for Educational Settings

options.title: History
courses: MUSCLG 125A - History of Western Music: Era of Church and Patron
MUSCLG 125B - History of Western Music: Era of Empires and Marketplaces
MUSCLG 125C - History of Western Music: Modern and Postmodern Era

options.title: Music Education
courses: MUSC 110A - Learning Approaches in Music Education
MUSC 110B - Musicality and Creativity in Childhood
MUSC 110C - Comparative Study of Choral Music Education
MUSC 110D - Comparative Study of Instrumental Music Education
MUSC 114A - Study of Instrumental Techniques: High Strings
MUSC 114B - Study of Instrumental Techniques: Low Strings
MUSC 114C - Vocal Techniques for Music Education I
MUSC 114D - Vocal Techniques for Music Education II
MUSC 114J - Piano Skill in Classroom
MUSC 115A - Study of Instrumental Techniques: Woodwinds
MUSC 115B - Study of Instrumental Techniques: Brass
MUSC 115C - Study of Instrumental Techniques: Percussion
MUSC 116 - Introduction to Conducting
MUSC 117 - Study and Conducting of Instrumental and Choral Literature

options.title: Instrumentalists
courses: Music 160A through 160U

options.title: Vocalists
courses: MUSC 161A - Advanced Voice Studio
MUSC 161C - Advanced Voice Coaching for Music Education Specialists

options.title: Public Recital
courses: Music 163A through 163V

options.title: Capstone Project
courses: MUSC 110D - Comparative Study of Instrumental Music Education
